home.quote: Ce qui embellit le désert, c'est qu'il cache un puits quelque part…
home.quoteTranslation: What makes the desert beautiful is that somewhere it hides a well…
home.heroAlt: The Little Prince sitting on the moon, watching a rose

common.comingSoon: This space is being prepared. Content is coming soon.

auth.error: Something went wrong. Check your email and password.

games.intro: The royal arena: every game is a "reasonable order". Pick a crown and beat the clock.
games.pickDifficulty: Pick a difficulty — you can restart anytime.
games.loginToRank: Sign in so your results count on the leaderboard
games.noRanks: No one has finished this difficulty yet — the throne awaits.

sudoku.name: Sudoku
sudoku.desc: Fill the 9×9 board with 1–9 so no row, column or box repeats.
sudoku.rules: Each row, column and 3×3 box must contain the digits 1–9 exactly once. Tap an empty cell, then enter a digit with the keyboard or the pad below — clashing digits turn red. Start with the cells that have the fewest candidates.

kakuro.name: Kakuro
kakuro.desc: Fill by the clue sums in the black cells: each run uses distinct digits 1–9 that add up exactly.
kakuro.rules: The number at a black cell's top right is the sum of the run to its right; bottom left is the sum of the run below. Digits 1–9, no repeats within a run — broken runs turn red. Start with the smallest or largest sums (a two-cell run of 3 can only be 1+2).

magic-square.name: Magic square
magic-square.desc: Place 1 to n² in the grid so every row, column and diagonal has the same sum.
magic-square.rules: Each number is used exactly once; every row, column and both diagonals must equal the magic sum. Compute it first (total of all numbers ÷ rows), then work from the diagonals and the centre.

magicSquare.target: Every row, column and both diagonals must sum to {sum}

tools.intro: Interactive classroom instruments: open directly, or copy the embed code into your courseware.

fraction-line.name: Fraction number line
fraction-line.desc: Add up unit fractions point by point and compare fraction units on one number line.

motion-lab.name: Motion lab
motion-lab.desc: Characters travel on parallel tracks — meet, chase, and watch the gaps live with the ruler.

fractionLine.zeroHint: Drag any integer tick to pan; double-click to reset

motion.solveHint: The value marked “auto” is computed from the other two; edit it to switch which one is solved
motion.dragHint: Drag a character to move and measure: the drag direction sets the travel direction; distance, time and speed fill in on release
motion.editHint: Click the avatar to upload a photo (long-press to reset); click the vehicle to switch (sets its speed, long-press to reset); click the position number to type a position; ◀ ▶ turns in place

dashboard.noScores: No finished games yet — win a star in the royal arena.

public.intro: Share mathematical ideas in public while keeping a quiet private writing space.
public.empty: No public notes yet. The first one is on its way.
public.noExcerpt: This post has no excerpt yet.

workspace.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Delete this note forever?
workspace.welcomeDescription: Create a note from the left sidebar, then add child notes to any depth.
workspace.archivedBanner: This note is in the trash and shown read-only

errors.conflict: This note changed in another window. Load the latest version to avoid overwriting it.
errors.too_large: This document exceeds the 1 MB limit. Shorten it and retry.
errors.invalid: The document format is invalid and cannot be saved.
errors.network: Save failed. Check the connection and retry.

list.intro: A whiteboard that opens in a snap: sketch and calculate alone, or share one canvas with friends.
list.empty: No whiteboards yet. Create one and start drawing.
list.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Delete this whiteboard?

tools.clearConfirm: Clear the whole board? You can still undo this once.

terms.intro: A learning line of mathematical definitions from primary school onward. The geographer records only eternal things.
terms.fromTo: Where it comes from · where it goes
terms.galaxyHint: Every star is a concept; the golden ones are those you have studied in depth. Hover to see what a star is, click to visit it.

termsUniverse.hint: Click a planet to explore its mathematics
termsUniverse.empty: This island is still wrapped in mist, waiting to be settled…
termsUniverse.graphIntro: A panoramic relation view for teachers and heavy explorers — planets and islands are the learning entrances.

number.name: Number & Quantity
number.tag: Where numbers are born, written and compared.

operations.name: Operations & Algorithms
operations.tag: The workshop of add, subtract, multiply, divide.

geometry.name: Geometry & Space
geometry.tag: A crystal world of shapes, measure and motion.

algebra.name: Algebra & Relations
algebra.tag: From concrete numbers to abstract relations.

functions.name: Functions & Change
functions.tag: The clock town of coordinates and change.

data.name: Data & Chance
data.tag: A lakeside observatory of statistics and randomness.

logic.name: Logic & Proof
logic.tag: The lighthouse coast of propositions and proof.

birth.name: Isle of Counting
birth.desc: Counting, natural numbers, zero and the number line.

notation.name: Tower of Place Value
notation.desc: Base ten, place value and big numbers.

factors.name: Mine of Factors
factors.desc: Factors, multiples, primes, odd and even.

rules.name: Isle of Rules
rules.desc: Order of operations, brackets and laws.

shapes.desc: Solid and plane figures, triangles, quadrilaterals, circles.

lines.desc: Segments, rays, lines, angles, perpendicular and parallel.

measure.desc: Length, perimeter, area, volume and units.

language.desc: Symbols and precise mathematical language, further ahead.

mindsSection.intro: Each way of thinking you grasp lights another lamp.
